table: |md ### MessageType Dictionary (Offset 0x04) | Value | Name | Description | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | 0x01 | JOIN | New node joining cluster | | 0x02 | LEAVE | Graceful exit | | 0x03 | SYNC | Anti-entropy state exchange | | 0x04 | ACK | Sequence confirmation |
